description_long: This sculpture features a highly detailed, realistic human face emerging from a geometric, almost cubist base. The face is expressive, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and a gentle smile, rendered in a classical style. On one side of the sculpture, intricate floral and organic motifs are sculpted in relief, adding a dynamic, textured contrast to the otherwise smooth and angular surfaces. The back and one side of the object are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the contrast between the organic and geometric elements. The entire piece sits on a rectangular plinth, giving it stability and presence. The surface appears to be made of weathered metal, likely bronze or a similar alloy, with a patina that gives it a greenish-gray coloration.
description: A realistic human face emerges from a geometric block, with intricate floral relief on one side and a weathered metallic surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the expressive human face and the beginning of the floral relief on the right side.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the detailed floral and organic motifs in relief, with the face partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a flat, unadorned surface with only the edge of the floral relief visible.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the geometric block and the profile of the human face, with minimal floral detail visible.
attribute_subject_matter: realistic human face with geometric and floral elements
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
